title: Fragment: Love The Universe To-Day.
content:
And who feels discord now or sorrow?
    Love is the universe to-day -
    These are the slaves of dim to-morrow,
    Darkening Life's labyrinthine way.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "Fragment: Love The Universe To-Day.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
